errors.birdie_pro_connect_failed: Can't connect to your Birdie Pro. Did it fly away?

notification.initializing:
Birdie Pro is calculating the Mold Risk, this takes 14 days.

Mold Risk is calculated based on temperature, humidity and CO₂ level. This is only an estimate and not a guarantee, please consult a professional if you suspect mold 🍄
notification.initialized: Birdie Pro has calculated the Mold Risk, you can now check it out on the device 🍄
